title: Add ProjectUpdater status export for CommandCenterUI integration
description: Companion to TASK-135 (CommandCenterUI integration, codex-lab-dino). ProjectUpdater is pure browser localStorage with no file-system or server access, so the only honest data bridge to CommandCenterUI's backend is a manual export. Add an 'Export status' action to Projects/ProjectUpdater/app/index.html that downloads a JSON snapshot (active/stale/dueSoon counts, project list with name/area/status/idle-days/due-days) to the browser's default download location as project-updater-status.json, matching the canonical path ~/Downloads/project-updater-status.json that dino's CommandCenterUI reader will poll. Keep ProjectUpdater fully static/serverless - the export is a plain browser download, not a file-system write API, so no new permission grants or backend dependency. This also implements the previously-captured IDEA-0015 (export/import JSON risk mitigation from RISK-0001).
acceptance_criteria: ProjectUpdater has an Export status action that downloads a JSON file named project-updater-status.json with active/stale/dueSoon counts and a project list
No server, file-system-write API, or new browser permission grant is introduced - a plain download link/blob, consistent with the app's static non-goals
Existing add/edit/delete/note/filter/persistence behavior is unaffected, verified via validate_project_updater.py
IDEA-0015 is marked resolved/implemented in the emergence index once this ships
